prompt: What is the coverage details URL for BlueCross Gold PPO plan?

expected_specs.Copayments: Primary Care Visit: $25 Copay, Specialist Visit: $50 Copay, Urgent Care: $50 Copay
expected_specs.Coinsurance: Emergency Room: 20% Coinsurance, Inpatient Hospital Services: 20% Coinsurance

prompt: Find the coverage URL for Aetna Silver HMO plan.

expected_specs.Copayments: Primary Care Visit: $40 Copay, Specialist Visit: $80 Copay (Referral Required), Urgent Care: $60 Copay
expected_specs.Coinsurance: Emergency Room: 30% Coinsurance, Inpatient Hospital Services: 30% Coinsurance
expected_specs.Extra Benefits: Telehealth access at $0 copay, Annual wellness visit included at no cost, Free access to participating fitness centers
